inputs.label: Real Part (z1)
inputs.businessContext: Real part of the first complex number

inputs.label: Imaginary Part (z1)
inputs.businessContext: Imaginary part of the first complex number

inputs.label: Real Part (z2)
inputs.businessContext: Real part of the second complex number

inputs.label: Imaginary Part (z2)
inputs.businessContext: Imaginary part of the second complex number

inputs.label: Operation
inputs.businessContext: 0: Add, 1: Subtract, 2: Multiply, 3: Divide, 4: Magnitude z1, 5: Phase z1 (rad)

formulas.divReal: (real1 * real2 + imag1 * imag2) / (real2 * real2 + imag2 * imag2)
formulas.divImag: (imag1 * real2 - real1 * imag2) / (real2 * real2 + imag2 * imag2)
